title: elainalike
description: Elaina-like Paintings.Created By AI.Not 100% the same.
body:
# **Elaina-Like**
Add an AI portrait of the protagonist Elaina in the Journey of Elaina.
Because it was painted by AI, it is not the same as the official one.
# **About Fabric**

**Fabric1.20.x requires Java21 to start!**
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0aff4d5aaf71c0539b0ce63775874d0350afa9b.png)
